questions.question: Will advanced AI systems achieve human-level general intelligence within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Determines strategic investments, regulatory frameworks, and risk management for AI development and deployment.

questions.question: Can decentralized internet infrastructure become the dominant model for global data transmission by 2030?
questions.why_it_matters: Impacts control over data, cybersecurity policies, and digital sovereignty worldwide.

questions.question: Will global geopolitical power shift decisively towards multipolarity rather than unipolarity by 2030?
questions.why_it_matters: Affects international cooperation, conflict dynamics, and global economic stability.

questions.question: Can large-scale, automated citizen participation platforms significantly increase democratic governance quality by 2030?
questions.why_it_matters: Could revolutionize political legitimacy and policymaking effectiveness globally.

questions.question: Will automation displace more than 30% of current jobs in advanced economies by 2035 without net job creation in new sectors?
questions.why_it_matters: Guides workforce retraining, social safety net design, and economic policy reforms.

questions.question: Can a broadly effective pan-coronavirus vaccine be developed and widely deployed by 2030?
questions.why_it_matters: Would dramatically reduce pandemic risks and global health costs.

questions.question: Is it feasible to achieve net-zero global carbon emissions by 2050 primarily through existing and scalable technologies?
questions.why_it_matters: Determines urgency and direction of climate policy and energy investments.

questions.question: Will immersive virtual environments replace traditional media as the dominant form of global entertainment consumption by 2040?
questions.why_it_matters: Influences cultural production, advertising models, and social interaction norms.
